introduction: *An ancient shrine radiates a warm, peaceful energy*
The altar is carved from white marble, untouched by time or decay. Soft golden light emanates from runes etched into its surface.
*You feel a comforting presence, as if the shrine recognizes you as an ally against the darkness*
The healing magic still functions after all these centuries.

options.text: [Rest at the shrine - Fully heal party]

introduction: You've already drawn upon the shrine's healing power. The ancient magic needs time to replenish.
The runes still glow softly, but the healing energy is spent.
